assignments.name: Assign_Case_Type_Failed_Payment_Case
assignments.label: Assign - Case Type - Failed Payment Case

assignments.name: Assign_Case_Type_Large_Health_Check
assignments.label: Assign - Case Type - Large Health Check

assignments.name: Assign_Case_Type_Overdue_Offline_Payer
assignments.label: Assign - Case Type - Overdue Offline Payer

assignments.name: Assign_Case_Type_Proactive_At_Risk
assignments.label: Assign - Case Type - Proactive At Risk

assignments.description: Updates the field "Case Origin" on the associated contact to "Failed Payment"
assignments.name: Set_Case_Origin_Value
assignments.label: Set Case Origin Value

assignments.description: Updates the field "Case Origin" on the new contact associated contact to "Failed Payment"
assignments.name: Set_Case_Origin_Value_New_Contact
assignments.label: Set Case Origin Value New Contact

assignments.description: If the Cancel Case is closed, wipe out the value from the field Case Origin from the associated contact.
assignments.name: Wipe_Out_Case_Origin
assignments.label: Wipe Out Case Origin

decisions.description: Checks if the contact associated with the case was changed. If it was, the values from the fields 'Most Recent Case Status' and 'New Case Type' need to be wiped out from the previous contact.
decisions.name: Associated_Contact_Changed
decisions.label: Associated Contact Changed?

decisions.description: If a Cancel Request case was created due to a not resolved Failed Payment case, asses how to update the Case Origin on the associated contact.
decisions.name: Cancel_Request_From_Failed_Payment
decisions.label: Cancel Request From Failed Payment

decisions.name: Did_we_make_changes
decisions.label: Did we make changes?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Did Nothing - Waste of a Flow Run

decisions.description: Evaluates if the related contact's field "Most Recent Case Status" needs to be updated.
decisions.name: Update_Contact_Case_Status
decisions.label: Update Contact Case Status?

decisions.description: If the case owner is not a Group user and it is a new case, or the contact associated with it is updated, then update the Engt Delegation Owner and SaaS Delegation Owner on the contact.
decisions.name: Update_Delegation_Owners
decisions.label: Update Delegation Owners?

Flow.description: PE - Updates fields on the related Contact based on other case fields. (Revenue.io Implementation Project) 12/14/23 - PE - Added "Stripe invoice payment failed queue" to entry criteria to fire the flow. 12/20/23 - PE - Added path to Low NPS 01/19/24 - PE - Now, updating case ownership will also update Engt Owner on contact. 03/01/24 - PE - On cancel cases criteria, removed the condition that the new case should not be owned by queue. 04/01/24 - PE - Updated account segment for Low NPS cases 04/11/24 - PE - Added Case Origin stamp assessment 04/23/24 - PE - Updated node that updates the Delegation Owners on the contact. 04/25/24 - PE - Added node to wipe out values from previous contact associated with case 05/10/24 - PE - Added Post-Save new case type 05/30/24 - PE - Updated Case Status node to not update status of closed FP cases being updated by Stripe 06/11/24 - PE - Updated node that wiped out contact when opportunity is closed, removing the != Cancel Request logic 07/01/24 - PE - Updated entry criteria so it doesn't run for specific Case Origin values. 09/26/24 - MC - Added Coupon Expiration Case Decision element and nodes to distinguish between At-risk and Coupon Expiration Proactive engagement cases 06/23/25 - PE - Added EC Cancellation Request mapping 02/25/26- PE- Changed the conditions to update the Most Recent Case Status to Contact
Flow.interviewLabel: Case - After Save - Sync Case fields to Contact {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Case - After Save - Sync Case Fields to Contact

recordUpdates.description: Wipes out the value from the field "Case Origin" on the contact that was associated with the case before it was replaced.
recordUpdates.name: Wipe_Out_Previous_Contact
recordUpdates.label: Wipe Out Previous Contact

recordUpdates.description: Wipe out values from fields 'Most Recent Case Status' and 'New Case Type' from previous contact
recordUpdates.name: Wipe_Out_Values_from_Previous_Contact
recordUpdates.label: Wipe Out Values from Previous Contact
